description: Style NoteCarry your essentials conveniently in these wallets from fossil. Crafted from genuine leather,  these wallets can be paired with any outfit and can become a fashion accessory! So, enhance your style with this fashionable, yet spacious wallet from Fossil. Product DetailsBlack leather wallet with two-foldsHas two main compartmentsHas eight card slots, five insert pockets and a zipped pocket to hold coinsBranding embossed on the frontMaterial and CareLeatherWipe surface with a damp cloth to remove dustSizeDimensions: 12 cm x 9 cm
